g.title: cluster_plugins
g.text: 9 sibling repos — each own .git, own flake (kernel-only subflake), own bare mirror

g.title: sdk_boundary
g.text: every plugin consumes this; kernel exports nothing else

g.title: deploy
g.text: · static archive — linked into kernel binary

g.title: workflow
g.text: so nested plugin .git/ are not auto-submodules.
· `nix run .#setup` clones every plugin from its mirror
into the slot; `nix run .#plugin -- pull` updates.
· post-rc1: each plugin pushed to org repo;
plugin's flake URL switches local-mirror → github.
